650.reason: [The condition logic is flawed: it attempts to peek ahead for FuncDef patterns but uses tryAndTest incorrectly in a loop guard, which may consume tokens or mispredict due to side effects. Also, the loop exits prematurely when a Decl fails, even if more Decls could follow.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition logic is flawed: it attempts to peek ahead for FuncDef patterns but uses tryAndTest incorrectly in a loop guard, which may consume tokens or mispredict due to side effects. Also, the loop exits prematurely when a Decl fails, even if more Decls could follow.]
